title: barringtonia semisuta
intro: Barringtonia semisuta, also known as the Sea poison tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Barringtonia semisuta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections, among others. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and can also be used as a paste or a poultice to treat various health conditions.
